description: DRAFT, non-normative (RUN-ATTEST-03 B.2). One side's half of a mutual co-signed edge. The edge EXISTS iff two halves, authored by the two personas named in the core, carry the identical canonical core (T-AT1.2): the core-hash equality is the join; the optional counterpart ref is one-directional convenience only. The side-local label is outside the core (T-AT1.4).

label.description: Side-local free text; NOT part of the core hash and may differ per side.

counterpart.description: Optional locator for the other half. Convenience only: a true bidirectional CID cross-reference is impossible (circularity), and the edge's identity is core equality, never this ref.

createdAt.description: Repo bookkeeping only; never an ordering input (T-AT0.4).

edgeCore.description: The canonical shared core, byte-identical across both halves (crate: EdgeCore; canonical dag-cbor keys a/b/c/m/n).

edgeNonce.description: The edge id: a nonce agreed by the pair.

consent.description: Closed: a well-formed edge is mutual; carried explicitly so a tampered mode changes the core hash (T-AT1.3).

ceremony.description: Ceremony fact object ids (content addresses), sorted. Ceremony session privates have NO lexicon home — private tier (T-A3.8).
